text: The image shows a street view of a residential area with tall buildings on both sides. The street is lined with trees and bushes on the left and right sides, and there are several cars parked on the right side of the street. The sky is blue with some clouds, and the buildings appear to be modern and high-rise. In the background, there are other tall buildings visible. The image appears to be taken from a distance, looking down the street towards the buildings.
